## Checklist

- [ ] This PR targets `main` from a feature branch.
- [ ] `pnpm verify` passes locally (format, lint, typecheck, test, build).
- [ ] Tests added or updated for the change (test-driven).
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior or the public surface changed.
- [ ] Preserves the adapter invariants — pure translator, no policy logic, fail-closed.
